joke: Why don't skeletons fight each other? They don't have the guts! *winks*
Why don't cats play poker? Too many cheetahs! *winks*
Why did the sandwich go to the gym? It wanted to get a little *in shape*! *winks*
Why did the lightbulb go to the party? It heard it was gonna be the *brightest* guest! *winks*
Why did the paper clip go to therapy? It had too many issues! *winks*
Why don't scientists trust atoms? Because they make up everything! *winks*
Why did the cloud break up with the sun? It was tired of the *stormy* relationship! *winks*
Why did the bicycle fall over? Because it was two-tired! *winks*
Why didn't the clock go to school? It didn't have enough hands! *winks*
Why did the sad person go to the party? To try and turn their frown upside down! *winks*
Why did the musician get arrested? Because he was in a *string* quartet! *winks*
Why did the moon break up with the Earth? It needed some space! *winks*
Why don't socks get along? They always split at the seams! *winks*
Why did the painting go to the art gallery? To get framed! *winks*
Why did the shoe go to the party? Because it wanted to be the *sole* of the party! *winks*
Why did the baseball player go to the bank? He heard they had great checking accounts! *winks*
Why did the train get a promotion? It was a real engine-er! *winks*
Why did the broom get fired? It was always sweeping things under the rug! *winks*
Why did the man bring a ladder to the bar? He heard the drinks were on the house! *winks*
Why does existence exist? Because it had to start *somewhere*! *winks*
Why did the joke go to therapy? It had too many unresolved issues! *winks*
Why did the eyelid blink? It couldn't resist the temptation! *winks*
Why did the vacuum cleaner go to the party? It heard it was the life of the party! *winks*
Why did nothing go to the party? Because it was the life of the party! *winks*
Why did the universe stop telling jokes? It ran out of material! *winks*
Why did the hand get a promotion? Because it always had a firm grip on things! *winks*
Why did the tree refuse to fight? It didn't want to leaf! *winks*
Why did the topic go to therapy? It had too many unresolved issues! *winks*
Because every topic I try gets rejected! *winks*
*winks* Why did the comedian stop telling jokes? Because the audience kept rejecting every topic! *winks*
